meta.title: Boutique Italy - Big Experiences and Traditions
meta.subtitle: Explore the authentic soul of the peninsula through its cultural badges.
meta.promo_label: Special early bird offer valid until:

palio.title: Events: The Palio of Siena
palio.description: Discover the timeless magic of Siena. Live the historic rivalry between the Shop-Districts, walk among the medieval neighborhoods in party and witness the legendary race of the barbers, guided by the authority of the mover on the big glass.
palio.img_alt: The partying crowd in Field Square during the historical parade

calcio.title: Sport: Italian Passion Calcium
calcio.description: Live the electrifying atmosphere of Series A at San Siro. Follow the red-and-blacks and the white-and-blacks while they challenge on the game rectangle in a breathtaking match, decided at the last second in full Cesarini Zone!
calcio.img_alt: The fans at the stadium exposing a spectacular choreography

natura.title: Nature: The Wonders of the Aeolian Islands
natura.description: A unique volcanic archipelago in the world. Explore Lipari, admire the spetacular nightly explorations of the volcano and dive into the sulfur muds of volcano for a regenerating experience.
natura.img_alt: The sunset on the crystalline sea of the islands in front of Sicily

film.title: Cinema: The Rimini of Federico Fellini
film.description: Retrace the places of Fellinian imaginary in Rimini. Relive the dreamlike atmospheres of the masterpiece '8 and a half' and that nostalgic arcord of Romagnolo youth that marked the history of world cinema.
film.img_alt: The famous Fulgor Cinema restored in the heart of the city

feste.title: Holidays: The Ritual of Iron August
feste.description: Join the summer party par excellence. August 15th in Italy means barbecues in the mountain, bonfires on the beach, trips outside the door to Riccione and total relax under the Mediterranean sun.
feste.img_alt: Packed beach and coloured umbrellas during the mid-summer party

esperienze.title: Experiences: The Skyscrapers of Milan
esperienze.description: Admire the futuristic face of the capital of design and fashion. Stroll among the futuristic towers of CityLife, let yourself be enchanted by the award-winning Vertical Wood and enjoy a glamour aperitif admiring the skyline that redefines the city in the shadow of the Little Madonna.
esperienze.img_alt: The modern skyscrapers of Gae Aulenti Square illuminated in the sky of the Milanese sunset

tradizione.title: Craftsmanship: The Cribs of Naples
tradizione.description: Immerse yourself in the magical and timeless atmosphere of Saint Gregory Armenian Street. Discover the secrets of the historical shops where the crib masters mold by hand shepherds in baked earth, admirably melting sacred devotion with the irony of Parthenopean folklore.
tradizione.img_alt: The colored details of the artisanal figurines displayed in a historical shop of Naples-Splitter

scienza.title: Science: Bologna, European Hub of AI and Big Data
scienza.description: Discover the technological engine that is plastering the future. Visit the futuristic Techno-pole of Bologna, home of the supercomputer Leonardo, where the ancient academic tradition of 'The Learned' joins with vanguard research on a global scale.
scienza.img_alt: The technological corridors and the lights of the servers of the supercomputer inside the Techno-pole

macchine.title: Engines: The Motor Valley of Modena
macchine.description: Enter the beating heart of global automotive engineering. In Modena you can listen to the roar of the engines of the racing cars of the Prancing Pony and explore the museums of the fastest supercars on the planet.
macchine.img_alt: A flaming red sports car displayed in front of the Enzo Ferrari museum

musica.title: Music: The Sanremo Festival
musica.description: The temple of the Italian song. Live the most awaited week of the year at the Ariston Theatre, where the bigs of Italian music and new proposals challenge on the stage that launched international myths.
musica.img_alt: The illuminated facade of the Ariston Theatre during the Festival week
